message:
feat(sync): atomic import transactions, dependency dedup, and ID rewriting

Storage:
- Add _on_active_tx variants for upsert/sync operations that participate
  in caller's transaction instead of opening their own
- Strengthen dependency sync: validate issue_id match, reject empty
  depends_on_id, deduplicate by (issue_id, depends_on_id) keeping latest
  created_at (aligns with schema constraint)
- Extract TX_MAX_RETRIES and TX_BASE_BACKOFF_MS as module constants

Sync:
- Switch process_import_action to _on_active_tx variants for atomic
  rollback on partial failures
- Add rewrite_issue_id_and_embedded_sources() to fix embedded deps/comments
  referencing old ID when external_ref match maps to different existing ID
- Align dependency dedup to (issue_id, depends_on_id) pair
- Extract JSONL_BUFREADER_CAPACITY, ESTIMATED_BYTES_PER_ISSUE,
  MISSING_IDS_PREVIEW_LIMIT as named constants

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
